full_text:
Sima Ling 司馬陵
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Ling (司馬陵). Son of Sima Tong, he was enfeoffed as a King when Sima Yan became Emperor. Sima Ling was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
